text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: One, two, three, four... Two, two, three, four...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Great, I'm all set. Now to ask someone to do a
partner run with me...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
All right! I'm in peak form today! My body's
surging with power!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Anyone wanna run with me?! I welcome all
comers!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Oh! In that case, I'd like to—

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
Heh. Guess I got no choice but to keep ya
company.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text:
Oh, what's this? Small fry should stay out of this,
honey. It's time for yours truly—the academy's
Gale-Force Turbine—to blow the competition
away.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume C
text_block_list.text: Hohohohohoho... I am the strongest of all.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Hey, hey! What's with all the hesitation, Dober?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
It looked like you were pumped up to take on
Vodka's challenge. Or was I seein' things? Did ya
lose your nerve after the others butted in?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Listen up, Dober. It don't matter one bit how full
of confidence all those other jokers seem.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
What's important is how ya felt when you were
about to step up to the plate. You want a
one-on-one face-off with Vodka! Am I wrong?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
You don't hafta make a fuss or nothing. Just focus
on taking down the opponent ya set yer sights on
and run! Go on, get out there!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. Now then, I think maybe I'm gonna crash
that little party myself!
